Defendant Yulish & Associates, Kathryn Yulish, Joshua Sack Motion To Consolidate Actions Of Case(S) Cgc-11-510203 With Case Cgc-11-511541
Off Calendar Aug-22-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS YULISH & ASSOCIATES, KATHRYN YULISH, JOSHUA SACK'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-11-510203 WITH CASE CGC-11-511541.
Appearances: Marc Haber of the Sparer Law Group (217.7300) for defendants and moving parties; Greg A. Call of Braun Hagey (599.0215) for plaintiff and responding party.
Discussed and the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Defendant Yulish & Associates' motion to consolidate is granted without prejudice for plaintiffs to bring a later motion to sever the cases for trial purposes. Order signed in open court. Case CGC-11-510203 will be designated the lead case. Order signed. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Reporter: Angie Diner, CSR 581
